stutteranalyzer.f3.active_full_last: SA: ACTIVE | Last: %s %s ms | Report saved
stutteranalyzer.f3.active_full_no_freeze: SA: ACTIVE | FPS watch: ON | Last freeze: none | Reports: %s
stutteranalyzer.hover.client_render_stut:
Client render stutter, %sms.

Meaning:
The renderer had a short pause.

Common causes:
- chunk mesh rebuild
- entity rendering spike
- texture or resource loading

Try:
- Sodium/Embeddium or Entity Culling
- reduce render distance
- /sa optimize suggest
stutteranalyzer.hover.server_tick_spike:
Server tick spike, %sms.

Meaning:
Server took too long on one tick.

Common causes:
- too many entities
- heavy mod logic
- world save or chunk loading

Try:
- /sa status
- reduce entity load
- /sa submit if repeated
stutteranalyzer.hover.chunk_generation:
Chunk generation, %sms.

Meaning:
New terrain chunks were generated.

Common causes:
- exploring new areas
- worldgen mods with complex structures

Try:
- pre-generate the world
- Noisium or C2ME
stutteranalyzer.hover.chunk_loading:
Chunk loading, %sms.

Meaning:
Chunks loaded from disk or streamed in.

Common causes:
- fast movement or teleport
- slow disk

Try:
- C2ME for async chunk loading
- check disk speed
stutteranalyzer.hover.chunk_render_rebui:
Chunk render rebuild, %sms.

Meaning:
Renderer rebuilt geometry for nearby chunks.

Common causes:
- many block updates nearby
- explosions or large builds

Try:
- Sodium/Embeddium
- reduce render distance
stutteranalyzer.hover.resource_reload:
Resource reload, %sms.

Meaning:
Game assets were reloaded.

Common causes:
- pressing F3+T
- resource pack change

Try:
- avoid unnecessary reloads
- ImmediatelyFast
stutteranalyzer.hover.shader_or_resource:
Shader/resource pack reload, %sms.

Meaning:
Shaders or resource pack loaded.

Common causes:
- enabling shaders
- switching resource packs

Try:
- normal for shader packs
- Iris or Oculus
stutteranalyzer.hover.memory_pressure:
Memory pressure, %sms.

Meaning:
Game running low on RAM.

Common causes:
- too many mods or high-res textures
- not enough RAM allocated

Try:
- allocate 4-8GB RAM
- FerriteCore
- MemoryLeakFix
stutteranalyzer.hover.garbage_collection:
Java GC pause, %sms.

Meaning:
JVM cleaned up unused memory.

Common causes:
- normal GC activity
- insufficient heap size

Try:
- allocate more RAM
- G1GC or ZGC JVM flags
- FerriteCore
stutteranalyzer.hover.entity_tick_overlo:
Entity tick overload, %sms.

Meaning:
Too many entities processed per tick.

Common causes:
- mob farms or large animal pens
- entity spawning bugs

Try:
- kill excess mobs
- Entity Culling
stutteranalyzer.hover.block_entity_tick_:
Block entity tick overload, %sms.

Meaning:
Too many machines or tile entities ticking.

Common causes:
- many machines from tech mods
- large automated farms

Try:
- reduce active machines in loaded chunks
- Enhanced Block Entities (Fabric)
stutteranalyzer.hover.world_save:
World save, %sms.

Meaning:
World data written to disk.

Common causes:
- auto-save or /save-all
- slow disk

Try:
- normal, just wait
- faster SSD
- ModernFix
stutteranalyzer.hover.datapack_or_comman:
Datapack/command function, %sms.

Meaning:
A datapack function ran too long.

Common causes:
- heavy datapack with many commands per tick

Try:
- check datapacks for expensive commands
stutteranalyzer.hover.network_or_packet_:
Network/packet spike, %sms.

Meaning:
A large packet or network delay.

Common causes:
- large chunk data sent
- poor connection

Try:
- check your connection
- Connectivity or Packet Fixer (Forge)
stutteranalyzer.hover.player_join:
Player join, %sms.

Meaning:
A player joined, causing a spike.

Common causes:
- loading player data and world state

Try:
- normal event, not a problem
stutteranalyzer.hover.player_teleport_or:
Teleport/dimension change, %sms.

Meaning:
Player teleported or changed dimension.

Common causes:
- loading new area or transferring state

Try:
- normal, just wait
- ModernFix speeds up transitions
stutteranalyzer.hover.lighting_engine_sp:
Lighting spike, %sms.

Meaning:
Lighting engine calculated light updates.

Common causes:
- placing/breaking light sources
- chunk loading in dark areas

Try:
- reduce light-emitting block spam
stutteranalyzer.hover.worldgen_noise:
Worldgen noise, %sms.

Meaning:
Procedural noise for terrain was slow.

Common causes:
- biome or worldgen mods
- first generation in new areas

Try:
- Noisium
- pre-generate world
stutteranalyzer.hover.lod_generation:
LOD generation, %sms.

Meaning:
A LOD mod generated far-away terrain.

Common causes:
- Distant Horizons active
- first-time LOD generation

Try:
- normal for LOD mods
stutteranalyzer.hover.lod_cache_io:
LOD cache I/O, %sms.

Meaning:
A LOD mod read/wrote its cache.

Common causes:
- Distant Horizons loading data
- slow disk

Try:
- normal for LOD mods
- faster SSD helps
stutteranalyzer.hover.background_throttl:
Background throttling, %sms.

Meaning:
Game limited by OS while in background.

Common causes:
- Minecraft window not focused
- Dynamic FPS active

Try:
- switch back to Minecraft window
- expected and harmless
stutteranalyzer.hover.mod_initialization:
Mod late loading, %sms.

Meaning:
A mod loaded resources after startup.

Common causes:
- mod loading data lazily on first use
- JIT compilation

Try:
- normal at startup
- LazyDFU helps
stutteranalyzer.hover.known_crash_patter:
Known crash pattern, %sms.

Meaning:
A stutter matching a known bug was detected.

Try:
- /sa preview for details
- /sa submit
stutteranalyzer.hover.emergency_guard_tr:
Emergency guard triggered, %sms.

Meaning:
Stutter Analyzer prevented worse lag.

Try:
- /sa preview for details
- check latest.log
stutteranalyzer.hover.world_join_load_sp:
World join loading, %sms.

Meaning:
Spike while joining or loading world.

Common causes:
- many mods loading at join time
- large world or inventory

Try:
- normal with many mods
- ModernFix
stutteranalyzer.hover.world_join_render_:
World join render stall, %sms.

Meaning:
Renderer stalled while setting up.

Common causes:
- initial chunk rendering on join
- shader loading

Try:
- normal, especially first join
- ImmediatelyFast
stutteranalyzer.hover.resource_reload_st:
Resource reload stall, %sms.

Meaning:
Resource reload caused a pause.

Common causes:
- many resource packs or high-res textures
- pressing F3+T

Try:
- reduce resource packs
- ImmediatelyFast
stutteranalyzer.hover.chunk_loading_hitc:
Chunk loading hitch, %sms.

Meaning:
Short pause from chunk loading.

Common causes:
- chunk streaming while moving
- disk I/O

Try:
- C2ME for async loading
- faster SSD
stutteranalyzer.hover.modpack_startup_st:
Modpack startup stall, %sms.

Meaning:
Stall detected at or just after startup.

Common causes:
- many mods loading simultaneously
- JIT warmup

Try:
- normal at startup
- LazyDFU
stutteranalyzer.hover.periodic_scheduled:
Scheduled micro-hitch, %sms.

Meaning:
Recurring small pause from a scheduled task.

Common causes:
- mod running a background task on a timer
- auto-save or cache flush

Try:
- usually harmless if short
- /sa alerts medium if too noisy
stutteranalyzer.hover.periodic_minor_mic:
Periodic micro-hitch, %sms.

Meaning:
Repeating tiny stutter detected.

Common causes:
- JVM GC running periodically
- mod tick on a timer

Try:
- /sa alerts medium if too noisy
- watch if it keeps repeating
stutteranalyzer.hover.unclassified_micro:
Minor micro-hitch, %sms.

Meaning:
Very short pause, usually harmless.

Common causes:
- chunk loading
- background Java/GC work
- small render spike

Try:
- ignore if occasional
- /sa alerts medium if too noisy
stutteranalyzer.hover.unclassified_frame:
Medium frame hitch, %sms.

Meaning:
Noticeable short pause, usually client-side.

Common causes:
- rendering spike
- chunk rebuild
- entity or resource loading

Try:
- check if it happens while loading chunks
- try renderer mods
- /sa preview after bigger freeze
stutteranalyzer.hover.unknown_extreme_fr:
Extreme freeze, %sms.

Meaning:
Game paused for over a second.

Common causes:
- world loading or resource reload
- heavy mod or GC
- server tick spike or disk stall

Try:
- /sa preview
- /sa submit
- check latest.log
stutteranalyzer.hover.unknown_freeze:
Freeze, %sms.

Meaning:
Game paused for a noticeable duration.

Common causes:
- chunk generation or loading
- resource reload or heavy mod logic
- server tick spike or disk pressure

Try:
- /sa preview
- /sa submit if useful
